Hero.description: An enterprise-grade, encrypted backup solution designed to capture your Microsoft Teams chats, files, and channels. Maintain full ownership of your organization's entire memory.

Features.title: Why backup Microsoft Teams?
Features.subtitle: Essential features engineered for enterprise compliance and peace of mind.
Features.f1Desc: Set it and forget it. Our engine runs daily differential backups of your entire organization.
Features.f2Desc: All data is securely encrypted at rest (AES-256) on your local/cloud volumes.
Features.f3Desc: We pull full message history, channel files, and threaded replies faithfully.
Features.f4Desc: Extract and restore formats native to auditors and legal discovery teams.

Comparison.title: Why default tools aren't enough
Comparison.subtitle: Microsoft Teams is built for communication, not for permanent, searchable record keeping.

Footer.description: Enterprise-grade backup solutions specifically engineered for Microsoft Teams architecture. Secure your chat history and files with transparent Graph API connections.
Footer.copyright: All rights reserved. Microsoft Teams is a trademark of Microsoft Corporation.

Terminal.title:
Built for Engineers.

Transparent by Design.
Terminal.subtitle: No black boxes. See exactly how we secure your Microsoft Teams data through a direct, transparent Graph API connection.
Terminal.step1: > initializing connection to Microsoft Graph API...
Terminal.step3: > scanning Teams channels and chat history...
Terminal.step5: > initiating encrypted data transfer to secure vault...

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Scale when you're ready. Enterprise-grade security at every tier.
Pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for individuals exploring Teams backup. No credit card required.
Pricing.proDesc: For growing teams that need reliable, continuous backup with advanced search.
Pricing.enterpriseDesc: For organizations needing compliance, SLA guarantees, and dedicated infrastructure.
